name: IRON FIST
description: Lin Lie is a master of Chinese martial arts who once wielded the shattered Sword of Fu Xi. After fusing its pieces with the mighty Chi of Shou-Lao, he is poised to strike his foes with the grace and force of a soaring dragon as the latest immortal Iron Fist
lore: Lin Lie inherited the legendary Sword of Fu Xi, becoming the hero known as Sword Master. But that was only the beginning of his epic journey. Eventually, he found himself in the mystical city of K'un Lun, where the dragon Shou-Lao blessed him with the power of the immortal Iron Fist. The Timestream Entanglement has caused great upheaval in a number of magical realms. As wars between the gods begin to rage, Lin Lie must protect the sanctuary of K'un Lun from those who seek to tarnish its majestic splendor.

abilities.name: Jeet Kune Do
abilities.description: Strike the targeted enemy with Jeet Kune Do, reducing the cooldown of Block and Strike with every hit

stats.Damage: The first four strikes each deal 35 damage, while the fifth strike deals 55 damage
stats.Attack Interval: The first four strikes have an interval of 0.45s between them, while the fifth strike has a 0.67s interval from the fourth strike

abilities.name: Yat Jee Chung Kuen
abilities.description: Dash forward to pursue the targeted enemy and unleash a flurry of attacks

stats.Damage: 8 base damage + 3.1% of the enemy's Max Health per strike

abilities.name: Living Chi
abilities.description: Become living Chi to boost his speed, damage, and attack range, delivering stronger punches while reducing the cooldown of Dragon's Defense

abilities.name: K'un-Lun Kick
abilities.description: Dash forward, delivering a flying kick when hitting an enemy or reaching full range, dealing damage to nearby enemies. Damage increases with lower enemy health

stats.Second Flying Kick Damage: 35 - 70 (Maximum damage is achieved when the target is at 50% Health)

abilities.name: Harmony Recovery
abilities.description: Cross legs and channel Chi, slowly gaining Bonus Health

abilities.name: Crane Leap
abilities.description: Perform up to three consecutive jumps while airborne

stats.Cooldown: 3 charges, with each charge taking 1s to recharge

abilities.name: Dragon's Defense
abilities.description: Assume a defensive stance with a boost of Chi to block incoming attacks and gain Damage Reduction, then strike back with Yat Jee Chung Kuen

abilities.name: Chi Absorption
abilities.description: Assists in taking down enemies allow him to absorb their Chi and gain Bonus Health

received.name: Lunar Chi
received.description: Luna Snow grants Winter's Chill to Hawkeye and Iron Fist. When Iron Fist activates Harmony Recovery, he can heal nearby allies with Lunar Chi

stats.Special Effect: Excess healing converts to Bonus Health.
stats.Healing Range: A cylindrical spell field with a 10m radius and a height of 10m.

base.description: Unleash a powerful uppercut to Launch Up enemies.

enhanced.description: When teaming up The Thing, unleashing the uppercut can be chained directly into a sweeping leg sweep for a follow-up attack.

base.description: Hitting an enemy with Yat Jee Chung Kuen provides a burst of healing to nearby allies.

enhanced.description: When teaming up White Fox, the lock-on distance for Yat Jee Chung Kuen is significantly increased.
